title: Social Life and Real Conversations
focus: Invitations, opinions, stories, emotions, culture, friendship, and natural small talk that goes beyond survival Spanish.

sentences.spanish: ¿Te apetece tomar un café este fin de semana?
sentences.english: Do you feel like having a coffee this weekend?

sentences.spanish: Me encantaría, pero primero tengo que terminar un trabajo.
sentences.english: I would love to, but first I have to finish an assignment.

sentences.spanish: En mi opinión, esta ciudad es muy acogedora.
sentences.english: In my opinion, this city is very welcoming.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero estudiar por la mañana a estudiar de noche porque me concentro mejor.
sentences.english: I prefer studying in the morning to studying at night because I concentrate better.

sentences.spanish: La primera vez que tomé el metro solo, me sentí orgulloso.
sentences.english: The first time I took the metro alone, I felt proud.

sentences.spanish: Últimamente me siento motivado porque estoy avanzando.
sentences.english: Lately I feel motivated because I am making progress.

sentences.spanish: Me llama la atención que aquí la gente cena tarde.
sentences.english: It catches my attention that here people eat dinner late.

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría conocer a gente que quiera practicar idiomas.
sentences.english: I would like to meet people who want to practice languages.

sentences.spanish: Entiendo tu punto, pero creo que depende del contexto.
sentences.english: I understand your point, but I think that it depends on the context.

sentences.spanish: Me alegro de haber hablado contigo sobre la universidad.
sentences.english: I am glad I talked with you about the university.

sentences.spanish: ¿Te apetece ir al cine este fin de semana?
sentences.english: Do you feel like going to the movies this weekend?

sentences.spanish: Me encantaría, pero primero tengo que llamar a mi familia.
sentences.english: I would love to, but first I have to call my family.

sentences.spanish: En mi opinión, el transporte público es bastante práctico.
sentences.english: In my opinion, public transportation is quite practical.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero caminar a tomar el autobús porque conozco mejor la ciudad.
sentences.english: I prefer walking to taking the bus because I get to know the city better.

sentences.spanish: La primera vez que hablé con un profesor, me sentí nervioso.
sentences.english: The first time I spoke with a professor, I felt nervous.

sentences.spanish: Últimamente me siento cansado porque duermo poco.
sentences.english: Lately I feel tired because I sleep very little.

sentences.spanish: Me llama la atención que aquí la gente habla muy rápido.
sentences.english: It catches my attention that here people speak very fast.

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría conocer a gente que estudie en mi facultad.
sentences.english: I would like to meet people who study in my school.

sentences.spanish: Entiendo tu punto, pero creo que hay otra solución.
sentences.english: I understand your point, but I think that there is another solution.

sentences.spanish: Me alegro de haber hablado contigo sobre la ciudad.
sentences.english: I am glad I talked with you about the city.

sentences.spanish: ¿Te apetece dar un paseo este fin de semana?
sentences.english: Do you feel like going for a walk this weekend?

sentences.spanish: Me encantaría, pero primero tengo que hacer la compra.
sentences.english: I would love to, but first I have to do the grocery shopping.

sentences.spanish: En mi opinión, la vida universitaria es intensa.
sentences.english: In my opinion, university life is intense.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero cocinar en casa a comer fuera porque ahorro dinero.
sentences.english: I prefer cooking at home to eating out because I save money.

sentences.spanish: La primera vez que pedí comida en español, me sentí contento.
sentences.english: The first time I ordered food in Spanish, I felt happy.

sentences.spanish: Últimamente me siento más seguro porque practico todos los días.
sentences.english: Lately I feel more confident because I practice every day.

sentences.spanish: Me llama la atención que aquí la gente sale mucho a la calle.
sentences.english: It catches my attention that here people spend a lot of time outside.

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría conocer a gente que le guste caminar.
sentences.english: I would like to meet people who like walking.

sentences.spanish: Entiendo tu punto, pero creo que no siempre es así.
sentences.english: I understand your point, but I think that it is not always like that.

sentences.spanish: Me alegro de haber hablado contigo sobre nuestras culturas.
sentences.english: I am glad I talked with you about our cultures.

sentences.spanish: ¿Te apetece estudiar juntos este fin de semana?
sentences.english: Do you feel like studying together this weekend?

sentences.spanish: Me encantaría, pero primero tengo que confirmar mi horario.
sentences.english: I would love to, but first I have to confirm my schedule.

sentences.spanish: En mi opinión, aprender idiomas es necesario.
sentences.english: In my opinion, learning languages is necessary.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero vivir cerca del campus a vivir en el centro porque pierdo menos tiempo.
sentences.english: I prefer living near campus to living downtown because I waste less time.

sentences.spanish: La primera vez que me perdí en la ciudad, me sentí un poco asustado.
sentences.english: The first time I got lost in the city, I felt a little scared.

sentences.spanish: Últimamente me siento estresado porque tengo muchos plazos.
sentences.english: Lately I feel stressed because I have many deadlines.

sentences.spanish: Me llama la atención que aquí la gente saluda con dos besos.
sentences.english: It catches my attention that here people greet with two kisses.

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría conocer a gente que haga deporte.
sentences.english: I would like to meet people who play sports.

sentences.spanish: Entiendo tu punto, pero creo que faltan datos.
sentences.english: I understand your point, but I think that some data is missing.

sentences.spanish: Me alegro de haber hablado contigo sobre los planes del fin de semana.
sentences.english: I am glad I talked with you about the weekend plans.

sentences.spanish: ¿Te apetece visitar un museo este fin de semana?
sentences.english: Do you feel like visiting a museum this weekend?

sentences.spanish: Me encantaría, pero primero tengo que descansar un rato.
sentences.english: I would love to, but first I have to rest for a while.

sentences.spanish: En mi opinión, vivir con compañeros es útil pero complicado.
sentences.english: In my opinion, living with roommates is useful but complicated.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero trabajar en grupo a trabajar solo porque aprendo de los demás.
sentences.english: I prefer working in a group to working alone because I learn from others.

sentences.spanish: La primera vez que conocí a mis compañeros, me sentí más tranquilo.
sentences.english: The first time I met my classmates, I felt calmer.

sentences.spanish: Últimamente me siento agradecido porque la gente me ayuda.
sentences.english: Lately I feel grateful because people help me.

sentences.spanish: Me llama la atención que aquí la gente toma café de pie.
sentences.english: It catches my attention that here people drink coffee standing up.

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría conocer a gente que disfrute de la música.
sentences.english: I would like to meet people who enjoy music.

sentences.spanish: Entiendo tu punto, pero creo que podemos verlo de otra manera.
sentences.english: I understand your point, but I think that we can see it another way.

sentences.spanish: Me alegro de haber hablado contigo sobre la clase.
sentences.english: I am glad I talked with you about the class.

sentences.spanish: ¿Te apetece cocinar algo este fin de semana?
sentences.english: Do you feel like cooking something this weekend?

sentences.spanish: Me encantaría, pero primero tengo que mandar un correo.
sentences.english: I would love to, but first I have to send an email.

sentences.spanish: En mi opinión, comer fuera es caro.
sentences.english: In my opinion, eating out is expensive.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero leer artículos a ver vídeos porque retengo más detalles.
sentences.english: I prefer reading articles to watching videos because I retain more details.

sentences.spanish: La primera vez que fui a una fiesta local, me sentí curioso.
sentences.english: The first time I went to a local party, I felt curious.

sentences.spanish: Últimamente me siento solo a veces porque echo de menos mi casa.
sentences.english: Lately I feel lonely sometimes because I miss home.

sentences.spanish: Me llama la atención que aquí la gente valora mucho la familia.
sentences.english: It catches my attention that here people value family a lot.

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría conocer a gente que tenga intereses parecidos.
sentences.english: I would like to meet people who have similar interests.

sentences.spanish: Entiendo tu punto, pero creo que la experiencia personal también importa.
sentences.english: I understand your point, but I think that personal experience also matters.

sentences.spanish: Me alegro de haber hablado contigo sobre el viaje.
sentences.english: I am glad I talked with you about the trip.

sentences.spanish: ¿Te apetece salir a cenar este fin de semana?
sentences.english: Do you feel like going out for dinner this weekend?

sentences.spanish: Me encantaría, pero primero tengo que preparar la presentación.
sentences.english: I would love to, but first I have to prepare the presentation.

sentences.spanish: En mi opinión, la cultura local es fascinante.
sentences.english: In my opinion, the local culture is fascinating.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero quedar en una cafetería a quedar en casa porque hay mejor ambiente.
sentences.english: I prefer meeting in a cafe to meeting at home because there is a better atmosphere.

sentences.spanish: La primera vez que viajé fuera de la ciudad, me sentí emocionado.
sentences.english: The first time I traveled outside the city, I felt excited.

sentences.spanish: Últimamente me siento optimista porque cada semana entiendo más.
sentences.english: Lately I feel optimistic because every week I understand more.

sentences.spanish: Me llama la atención que aquí la gente queda en plazas.
sentences.english: It catches my attention that here people meet in squares.

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría conocer a gente que conozca bien la ciudad.
sentences.english: I would like to meet people who know the city well.

sentences.spanish: Entiendo tu punto, pero creo que es más complicado.
sentences.english: I understand your point, but I think that it is more complicated.

sentences.spanish: Me alegro de haber hablado contigo sobre la comida.
sentences.english: I am glad I talked with you about food.

sentences.spanish: ¿Te apetece hacer una excursión este fin de semana?
sentences.english: Do you feel like taking a day trip this weekend?

sentences.spanish: Me encantaría, pero primero tengo que ir al banco.
sentences.english: I would love to, but first I have to go to the bank.

sentences.spanish: En mi opinión, estudiar en otro país es una gran oportunidad.
sentences.english: In my opinion, studying abroad is a great opportunity.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero viajar en tren a viajar en avión porque es menos estresante.
sentences.english: I prefer traveling by train to traveling by plane because it is less stressful.

sentences.spanish: La primera vez que entendí una broma, me sentí muy feliz.
sentences.english: The first time I understood a joke, I felt very happy.

sentences.spanish: Últimamente me siento confundido porque hay muchas normas nuevas.
sentences.english: Lately I feel confused because there are many new rules.

sentences.spanish: Me llama la atención que aquí la gente usa menos efectivo.
sentences.english: It catches my attention that here people use less cash.

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría conocer a gente que quiera cocinar juntos.
sentences.english: I would like to meet people who want to cook together.

sentences.spanish: Entiendo tu punto, pero creo que la solución tiene riesgos.
sentences.english: I understand your point, but I think that the solution has risks.

sentences.spanish: Me alegro de haber hablado contigo sobre el proyecto.
sentences.english: I am glad I talked with you about the project.

sentences.spanish: ¿Te apetece ver un partido este fin de semana?
sentences.english: Do you feel like watching a game this weekend?

sentences.spanish: Me encantaría, pero primero tengo que limpiar la cocina.
sentences.english: I would love to, but first I have to clean the kitchen.

sentences.spanish: En mi opinión, hacer amigos adultos es más difícil de lo que parece.
sentences.english: In my opinion, making friends as an adult is harder than it seems.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero comprar en el mercado a comprar por internet porque los productos son más frescos.
sentences.english: I prefer shopping at the market to shopping online because the products are fresher.

sentences.spanish: La primera vez que resolví un trámite, me sentí aliviado.
sentences.english: The first time I sorted out paperwork, I felt relieved.

sentences.spanish: Últimamente me siento inspirado porque conozco personas interesantes.
sentences.english: Lately I feel inspired because I meet interesting people.

sentences.spanish: Me llama la atención que aquí la gente discute con mucha energía.
sentences.english: It catches my attention that here people discuss things with a lot of energy.

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría conocer a gente que sea paciente con mi español.
sentences.english: I would like to meet people who are patient with my Spanish.

sentences.spanish: Entiendo tu punto, pero creo que la prioridad debería ser otra.
sentences.english: I understand your point, but I think that the priority should be different.

sentences.spanish: Me alegro de haber hablado contigo sobre la vida aquí.
sentences.english: I am glad I talked with you about life here.

sentences.spanish: ¿Te apetece conocer el centro este fin de semana?
sentences.english: Do you feel like exploring downtown this weekend?

sentences.spanish: Me encantaría, pero primero tengo que resolver un trámite.
sentences.english: I would love to, but first I have to sort out some paperwork.

sentences.spanish: En mi opinión, el clima es un poco impredecible.
sentences.english: In my opinion, the weather is a bit unpredictable.

sentences.spanish: Prefiero escuchar podcasts a memorizar listas porque suena más natural.
sentences.english: I prefer listening to podcasts to memorizing lists because it sounds more natural.

sentences.spanish: La primera vez que di mi opinión en clase, me sentí seguro.
sentences.english: The first time I gave my opinion in class, I felt confident.

sentences.spanish: Últimamente me siento tranquilo porque ya tengo una rutina.
sentences.english: Lately I feel calm because I already have a routine.

sentences.spanish: Me llama la atención que aquí la gente dedica tiempo a comer.
sentences.english: It catches my attention that here people take time to eat.

sentences.spanish: Me gustaría conocer a gente que le guste hablar de libros.
sentences.english: I would like to meet people who like talking about books.

sentences.spanish: Entiendo tu punto, pero creo que necesitamos más tiempo.
sentences.english: I understand your point, but I think that we need more time.

sentences.spanish: Me alegro de haber hablado contigo sobre el futuro.
sentences.english: I am glad I talked with you about the future.
